creator: marius@nuenneri.ch
text:
On Sun, May 24, 2009 at 11:40, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/mumble,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134893 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/134893
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Yes, please go ahead.
